Simple Process

How MediSathi Works

From your first query to complete care — we guide every step.

1

Share Your Health Concern

Tell us your symptoms, condition, or the specialist you need — via call, WhatsApp, or our form.

2

Get Connected to Right Hospital

Our coordinators match you with the best hospital and specialist for your condition and urgency.

3

Appointment & Travel Assistance

We book confirmed appointments, arrange transport, and assist with all admission paperwork.

4

Receive Guided Healthcare Support

We stay with you through consultation, admission, discharge, and follow-up for full peace of mind.

Our Services

Complete Healthcare Assistance

We handle every aspect of your healthcare journey — from finding the right doctor to arranging your return journey home.

Hospital Appointment Booking

We book confirmed appointments at top partner hospitals — no waiting, no confusion. Priority slots guaranteed.

Learn more

Specialist Consultation Assistance

Get connected to India's top specialists across 20+ specialities — cardiology, oncology, neurology, and more.

Learn more

Cab & Patient Transport Support

Safe, comfortable patient transport arranged — home to hospital and back. Ambulance services also coordinated.

Learn more

Hospital Admission Guidance

Navigate complex admission processes with ease. We handle documentation, insurance queries, and bed arrangements.

Learn more

Medical Second Opinion

Uncertain about a diagnosis? We connect you with senior specialists for credible second medical opinions.

Learn more

Follow-up Coordination

We schedule and remind you about post-treatment follow-ups, lab tests, and medication refills.

Learn more

Why MediSathi

A Companion You Can Truly Trust

We're not a hospital. We're your personal healthcare navigator — ensuring you get the right care, at the right place, at the right time.

No commission from hospitals. 100% patient-first approach.
Real human coordinators — not bots or IVR systems.
Available 24/7 including weekends, holidays & emergencies.

Personalized Support

Every patient gets a dedicated coordinator through the entire process.

Fast Coordination

Appointments booked within hours. Priority access at top hospitals.

Trusted Network

200+ verified partner hospitals — each carefully vetted by our team.

Multi-city Assistance

We operate across 50+ cities. Inter-city travel support also arranged.

Real Human Care

Empathetic, trained healthcare staff — speak to a real person always.

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees. Clear communication about costs at every step.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about MediSathi and how we help patients.

No, MediSathi is NOT a hospital. We are a patient assistance and healthcare coordination platform. We help patients connect with the right hospitals, specialists, and support services — but we do not provide medical treatment directly.
Fill our online form or call / WhatsApp us. Share your health concern, city, and urgency. Our healthcare coordinator will contact you within 30 minutes and book a confirmed appointment — often on the same day.
Yes! We coordinate both patient transport cabs and ambulance arrangements. Whether you need a comfortable cab for outpatient visits or emergency ambulance, our team arranges appropriate transport including inter-city patient transfers.
Absolutely. Your privacy is our highest priority. All patient information is handled with strict confidentiality, encrypted storage, and shared only with relevant medical personnel with your consent. We never sell your data.
We operate in 50+ cities across India including Kolkata, Delhi/NCR, Mumbai, Chennai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Patna, Lucknow, Vellore, Chandigarh, and many more. Inter-state medical travel assistance is also facilitated.
Basic appointment coordination is free for patients. Some premium services like dedicated case management and inter-city coordination may have a transparent service fee. We always inform you of any charges upfront — no hidden costs ever.

Your trusted healthcare companion — connecting patients with the right hospitals, specialists, and care support across India. Available 24/7.
